content.description: Notebook content as a ProseMirror JSON document structure.

deleted.description: Whether the notebook has been soft-deleted.

projectId.description: Override the active project for this single call only. Does not change the active project — use switch-project for a persistent change. Defaults to the active project when omitted. Must be a project the API key can access, or the call returns a permission error.

text_content.description: Plain text representation of the notebook content for search.

version.description: Version number for optimistic concurrency control. Must match the current version when updating content.
